content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description claims "Built-in ad blocker", "AI-powered suggestions", and "Works fully offline", but ContentView.swift is a plain in-memory task list with no ad-blocking, ML/AI, or persistence code.
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose marketing promises features the binary does not deliver, and here the description advertises three headline capabilities with zero code evidence — no network content filter, no CoreML/AI import, and no offline storage (tasks vanish on relaunch). Either implement these features or remove the ad blocker, AI suggestion, and "fully offline" claims from the metadata before submission.
